name: Brie Pinwheel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top rind of the brie.
2. Lightly mark the surface of the cheese into four pie-shaped wedges with a knife.
3. Divide each wedge into three smaller wedges, marking lightly.
4. Sprinkle half the chopped walnuts onto one of the wedge sections and press them gently into the surface.
5. Repeat the process with half of the chopped fresh dill, then half of the poppy seeds, watercress, almonds, and chives, moving around the wheel in order.
6. Allow the assembled brie to stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
7. The pinwheel can be loosely wrapped and refrigerated for up to four hours if needed.
